tasks.subject: Task 6: Add protocol field to REST DTOs
Task 7: Widen frontend models to discriminated union
Task 8: Update DotAuthService types
tasks.notes: No source change required — service already uses generic DotAuthConfigView/DotAuthConfigPayload types which automatically pick up the Task 7 union widening.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Protocol column + composed status tag
Task 10: SAML coverage for list + store tests
tasks.notes: Phase-2 never shipped spec files. Bootstrapped dot-auth-list.store.spec.ts and dot-auth-list.component.spec.ts from scratch with OAUTH + SAML fixtures. Also fixed store initialState missing the new protocol field, and added isolatedModules:true to tsconfig.spec.json.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Protocol toggle + SAML fieldsets in edit dialog
Task 12: SAML + protocol-switch coverage for edit component
tasks.notes: Phase-2 never shipped dot-auth-edit.component.spec.ts. Bootstrapped from scratch with OAUTH/SAML describe blocks, discriminated-payload save coverage, privateKey mask round-trip, and ConfirmationService switch-protocol coverage.

tasks.subject: Task 14.1: SAML custom attributes + metadata download button
tasks.notes: Added after Task 14 auto-verification based on user feedback. Backend: SamlProtocolHandler preserves arbitrary extra keys (maskedValues includes them; buildSecrets passes them through as strings; client is authoritative on save). Frontend: DotAuthSamlConfigValues gains [extraKey: string]: unknown + DOT_AUTH_SAML_DECLARED_KEYS export. Edit dialog gains a FormArray of {key,value} rows with required/reserved-key/duplicate-key validators. buttonParam (YAML BUTTON type) swapped from a text input to a Download Metadata button that GETs /api/v1/dotsaml/metadata/<hostId>; URL stays in a hidden form control for round-trip. 15 new i18n keys, 4 backend tests, 11 frontend tests.

tasks.subject: Task 14.2: Widen edit dialog for SAML density
tasks.notes: Dialog width 700px → min(96vw, 1040px) to accommodate IDP metadata XML, PEM certs, and the custom-attributes editor without cramped columns.

tasks.subject: Task 14: CHECKPOINT — build, lint, test; manual Okta E2E + upgrade smoke deferred
tasks.notes: Automated: ./mvnw clean install -DskipTests passed; 29 backend tests pass (OAuth 7, SAML 11 including extras, Resource 11); dot-auth 41+ frontend tests pass; dotcms-ui build succeeded. Manual Okta E2E + upgrade smoke deferred to the user — backend verified via live REST curl returning correct SAML protocol, configured state, and masked values. Two test-stability commits included: 05f877830a (HostAPI import fix) and 5e4e0a8857 (primeng/textarea module + real ConfirmationService in list spec + reordered store error test) and 7cb8f79392 (drop unused variable).

tasks.subject: Task 15 (redefined): preserve dotsaml-config.yml, redirect /apps/dotsaml-config → dotAuth, filter from Apps grid, remove /v1/dotauth/debug
tasks.notes: SCOPE CHANGED from the original plan. User decided keeping the YAML is safer than deleting it (preserves Apps descriptor metadata lookup at runtime). Three commits: (1) dotAppsSamlRedirectGuard attached to /apps/:appKey routes redirects dotsaml-config to /dotAuth; (2) HIDDEN_APP_KEYS filter in DotAppsListComponent hides the SAML card from the Apps grid; (3) /v1/dotauth/debug endpoint and its only-user imports (DotAuthConstants, OAuthAppConfig, HashMap, Try) removed from DotAuthResource. dotAuth OAuth key not included in the redirect per user decision — that YAML was never in core before this branch.

notes: Phase-3 implementation complete. 18 commits on feat/dotauth-saml-integration since the plan was committed. Two items outside the original plan: Task 14.1 (custom attributes + metadata download), Task 14.2 (dialog width). Task 15 scope redefined per user decision (preserve YAML + redirect vs delete). Outstanding manual verification: Okta E2E walkthrough + upgrade smoke on a pre-existing dotsaml-config row.
